title: derris alborubra
intro: Derris alborubra, also known as the yellow derris, is a plant species belonging to the family Leguminosae, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of rotenone and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Derris alborubra include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In traditional medicine, Derris alborubra is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
